symbols.name: ToDateOnly(DateTimeOffset)
symbols.summary: Converts a System.DateTimeOffset value to a System.DateOnly, preserving only the calendar date (in the source's local time) and discarding the time and offset components.

syntax.content: public static DateOnly ToDateOnly(this DateTimeOffset source)

parameters.description: The source System.DateTimeOffset value.

returns.description: A System.DateOnly representing the date portion of the original System.DateTimeOffset.

parameters.description: The source System.DateTimeOffset value.

returns.description: A System.DateOnly representing the date portion of the original System.DateTimeOffset.

symbols.name: ToTimeOnly(DateTimeOffset)
symbols.summary: Converts a System.DateTimeOffset value to a System.TimeOnly, preserving only the time-of-day component in the source's local time and discarding the date and offset components.

syntax.content: public static TimeOnly ToTimeOnly(this DateTimeOffset source)

parameters.description: The source System.DateTimeOffset value.

returns.description: A System.TimeOnly representing the time portion of the original System.DateTimeOffset.

parameters.description: The source System.DateTimeOffset value.

returns.description: A System.TimeOnly representing the time portion of the original System.DateTimeOffset.
